_doc: === SOURCE ATTRIBUTION: Links a source to an entity or situation claim ===
_source_id: REQUIRED. UUID of the Source record.
_target_id: REQUIRED. UUID of the Entity or Situation this source supports.
_retrieved_at: REQUIRED. When this claim was retrieved from the source.
_original_url: OPTIONAL. URL of the specific article/page/endpoint.
excerpt: Access log shows entry at Gate 7 at 22:28, exit at 23:17
_excerpt: OPTIONAL. Relevant excerpt from the source material.
_extraction_confidence: REQUIRED. Float 0.0-1.0. How well the extraction process parsed this source.
_claim: OPTIONAL. Which hypothesis this source supports. When set, Dempster-Shafer mass is concentrated on this claim rather than distributed uniformly.
